message:
test(fuzz): fcp-crypto Blake3Mac + IncrementalMac fuzz (j1c6k)

Add fuzz_blake3_mac covering fcp_crypto::mac (mac.rs:21-194):
Blake3Mac::compute/compute_full/verify/verify_full, IncrementalMac,
the free-function family (blake3_mac, blake3_mac_full,
blake3_mac_verify), and MacKey::try_from_slice. Properties: 16/32-byte
round-trips, truncation invariant (compute(m) == compute_full(m)[..16]),
incremental == one-shot agreement, free-function == method, wrong-tag
rejection (SignatureVerificationFailed), wrong-key/wrong-message
binding, MacKey::try_from_slice 32-byte gate with InvalidKeyLength
carrying actual length. Once-gated anchors verify boundary lengths,
truncation, and chunked vs one-shot agreement on a fixed input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
